datapoints.name: git_fetch_rate

description: ArgoCD repo server git request rates, latency percentiles, and error rates via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Git operation metrics from argocd_git_request_total (counter with request_type and grpc_code labels) and argocd_git_request_duration_seconds (histogram). Error rate filters for non-OK gRPC codes. NaN/Inf histogram results default to 0.
name: ArgoCD_Repo_Server
